objective: Prevent DifferentiationPlatformService upsert-by-key from matching workspace-scoped rows when the current request is tenant-scoped or lacks workspace context.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
validationRun: .\mvnw.cmd -pl services/foundation-service -am test passed with 103 foundation-service tests and upstream shared-module tests.
git diff --check for touched differentiation service/test/checkpoint files passed with CRLF warnings only.
outcome: DifferentiationPlatformService upsertByKey now uses null-safe exact workspace matching so tenant-scoped upserts cannot match workspace-scoped rows when workspaceId is null.
residualRisks: Existing list/evaluate helper queries still intentionally include tenant-level rows with workspace rows and should be reviewed per endpoint semantics before changing behavior.
Tenant lifecycle policy, public contact admin scoping, and config version-history scope still need separate policy or schema decisions.
Production release remains blocked by target-environment evidence and strict release gates.
nextAction: Record completion in backlog/memory/handoff, release leases, then select the next safe foundation-service item.
